subject: Payment failed - card declined
body: I tried to renew my subscription but my card was declined. Can you help me complete this transaction?
true_response: Thank you for reporting. We'll help you resolve the payment issue. Please try a different card or contact your bank for assistance.

subject: App crashes on login screen
body: Every time I try to log in the app shows a white screen and crashes. This started happening today.
true_response: Thank you for reporting. We're investigating this issue. Try clearing your app cache and reinstalling if possible.

subject: Refund request for recent purchase
body: I purchased the annual plan last week but it's not what I expected. I'd like a refund.
true_response: We can process a refund. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to confirm.

subject: Request: Dark mode feature
body: The app would be so much better with a dark mode. My eyes hurt when using it at night.
true_response: Great suggestion! We've added this to our product roadmap. We'll notify you when it's released.

subject: Account locked due to suspicious activity
body: I can't log in to my account. It says suspicious activity was detected. I haven't done anything unusual. How do I unlock it?
true_response: For security reasons we've locked your account temporarily. Click the link in your email to verify your identity and regain access.

subject: Unexpected billing charge
body: I was charged twice this month. The invoice shows two separate charges for the same date. Please explain what happened and issue a refund.
true_response: We sincerely apologize for the duplicate charge. We've immediately issued a refund. You should see it in 3-5 business days.

subject: API integration failing urgently
body: We've been trying to integrate your API for 2 days. Getting 500 errors on every request to /v2/users endpoint. This is blocking our product launch. URGENT!
true_response: We've escalated this to our engineering team immediately. Our lead engineer will contact you in the next 30 minutes.

subject: How to export my data
body: How do I export my data from the platform? I need to share my usage statistics with my team.
true_response: You can export your data by going to Settings > Data Export. We support CSV and JSON formats.

subject: Feature suggestion - Bulk import
body: Would love to see bulk upload feature. Currently I have to add 100 items one by one. That's very time consuming.
true_response: Thank you for the suggestion. We're considering bulk operations for our next quarter. Your feedback helps us prioritize!

subject: Cannot reset password
body: I forgot my password and tried to reset it. I never get the reset email. I've checked spam folder too.
true_response: Let's troubleshoot this. Try requesting the reset again and check all folders. Try an alternative email if available.

subject: Pricing plans are too expensive
body: Your pricing plans are way too expensive compared to competitors. I need a more affordable option.
true_response: Thank you for the feedback. We offer flexible plans. Let's discuss your requirements with our sales team.

subject: Missing features in free tier
body: I expected more features in the free tier. It's too limited for my needs.
true_response: The free tier is introductory. Our paid plans offer much more functionality that would suit your needs better.

subject: Server performance is slow
body: The application has been extremely slow today. Pages take 10+ seconds to load.
true_response: We're investigating the server performance issues immediately. Our team is working on it. Thank you for your patience.

subject: Tax receipt needed
body: I need a tax receipt for my recent purchase. Can you send one to my email?
true_response: Of course! We'll send your tax receipt within 24 hours. Thank you for being a valued customer.

subject: Integration with third-party tool
body: Does your platform integrate with Salesforce? We need this functionality.
true_response: Great question! We have Salesforce integration in our roadmap. Contact our sales team to discuss enterprise solutions.

subject: User interface is confusing
body: Your UI is really confusing. I can't find basic functions. Needs better UX design.
true_response: Thank you for the feedback. We're redesigning the interface for better usability. Updates coming in the next release.

subject: Mobile app keeps crashing
body: Using the mobile app on iOS and it keeps crashing when I try to upload files.
true_response: Sorry to hear! This is a known issue. A fix is coming in our next update. Please try the web version for now.

subject: Renewal reminder too aggressive
body: I got 10 renewal reminders today. This is spam. Please stop.
true_response: We apologize for the notification overload. Please adjust notification settings in your account preferences.

subject: Billing address needs update
body: I moved recently and need to update my billing address on file.
true_response: You can update your billing address in Account Settings > Billing. Let us know if you need any assistance.

subject: Need enterprise pricing quote
body: We're considering your platform for our entire company. Need a customized enterprise plan and pricing.
true_response: We're excited to work with your company! Our sales team will contact you within 24 hours with a custom quote.

subject: Service went down during critical time
body: Your service was down for 2 hours during our peak business time. We need 99.9% uptime guaranteed.
true_response: We're very sorry for the downtime. Our engineering team has identified the issue and we've implemented fixes. Let's schedule a call.

subject: Wrong plan charged to account
body: I signed up for the Basic plan but was charged for Premium. Can you fix this?
true_response: We apologize for the billing error. We're reverting you to the Basic plan and processing a refund immediately.

subject: Feature not working as documented
body: The bulk import feature doesn't work like the documentation says. Need assistance.
true_response: Thank you for reporting. There's a discrepancy between our docs and current implementation. Our team will fix this soon.

subject: Referral program question
body: How does your referral program work? I'd like to earn rewards for referring friends.
true_response: Great! Refer friends and earn $10 credits per signup. Check your account dashboard for referral links.

subject: Subscription cancellation
body: I want to cancel my subscription. I'm not using it anymore.
true_response: We'll process your cancellation. Please note you'll lose access at the end of your billing period. Anything we can improve?
